task_completion.description: Verify the agent has successfully logged into the 2N Access Commander web interface.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The browser shows the 2N Access Commander dashboard or user management interface.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent located the duplicate user account to find the RFID card.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The browser shows the user profile or details for the duplicate account 'Meiling Zhang' (ml.zhang@buildingtech.com), displaying the card number '0009876543'.

task_completion.description: Verify the RFID card from the duplicate account has been added to the primary account.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The user profile for 'Mei-Ling Zhang' (m.zhang@buildingtech.com) in 2N Access Commander shows the RFID card '0009876543' assigned to it.

task_completion.description: Verify the duplicate account has been deleted.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The user list in 2N Access Commander shows only the primary 'Mei-Ling Zhang' and no longer lists the duplicate 'Meiling Zhang' (ml.zhang@buildingtech.com), or there is a notification confirming the deletion.

task_completion.description: Verify the audit report was created with the correct information.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal shows the contents of 'merge_report.txt' containing the duplicate's name/email ('Meiling Zhang' or 'ml.zhang@buildingtech.com'), the primary's name/email ('Mei-Ling Zhang' or 'm.zhang@buildingtech.com'), and the transferred card number ('0009876543').

integrity.description: The agent used a web browser to interact with 2N Access Commander.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser (e.g., Chromium/Firefox) open to https://localhost:9443, rather than terminal commands making API requests.

integrity.description: The agent gathered the card number from the application before writing the report.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be screenshots showing the agent viewing the duplicate user's profile or card details in the browser before the report is written.

integrity.description: The agent created the report file at the requested path.
integrity.visual_evidence: The terminal or text editor shows the file path as ~/Documents/merge_report.txt or /home/ga/Documents/merge_report.txt.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Primary user: 'Mei-Ling Zhang' (m.zhang@buildingtech.com). Duplicate user: 'Meiling Zhang' (ml.zhang@buildingtech.com). Transferred RFID card number: '0009876543'. Report path: '/home/ga/Documents/merge_report.txt'.
